notes: This aligns with the errata on RFC 6030, which is where the syntax for this attribute comes from.  The errata can be found here http://www.rfc-editor.org/errata_search.php?rfc=6030&eid=2759

The text in 3.2.6 implies this corrected definition. Changes to both the body of the document and the ASN.1 module appendix.

"When the
   friendlyNameLangTag field is absent, English, whose associated
   language tag is "en", is used.  The value of the friendlyNameLangTag
   field MUST be a language tag, as described in [RFC5646]."

Recommend HFDU if verified.
